# Nazareth Gradín

> Nazareth Gradín is a Product & UX Designer, Digital Strategist and Creative Technologist based in Galicia, Spain. She helps businesses, startups, agencies and purpose-driven brands transform ideas into meaningful digital products, services and experiences by connecting strategy, user experience, branding and technology.

With a multidisciplinary background spanning design, marketing, communication and web development, Nazareth works across the entire product lifecycle: from discovery and strategy to design, launch and continuous improvement.

## Expertise

- Product Design
- UX/UI Design
- Digital Strategy
- Brand Strategy
- Experience Design
- Web Design & Development
- WordPress Development
- Next.js Development
- AI-Driven Workflows & Automation
- Marketing & Growth

## Value Proposition

Nazareth bridges the gap between business goals, human needs and technology.

Her work combines strategic thinking, human-centered design, brand clarity, technical execution and sustainable digital growth. The result is digital experiences that are meaningful, intuitive and commercially effective.

## Areas of Experience

Nazareth has collaborated with projects across multiple sectors, including:

- Travel & Tourism
- Wellness & Health
- Education & E-learning
- Culture & Public Institutions
- Personal Brands
- Service Businesses
- Digital Products & Startups

She is open to collaborating across industries where strategy, design, technology and human-centered thinking can create meaningful impact.

## Location

- O Porriño, Galicia, Spain
- Vigo Metropolitan Area
- Available for remote collaboration worldwide

## Main Pages

- https://nazarethgradin.com : Home — Product & UX Designer portfolio, value proposition and featured projects
- https://nazarethgradin.com/projects : Projects — full portfolio with filters by discipline (Product Design, Branding, Web, Strategy, Marketing, AI-Driven)
- https://nazarethgradin.com/about : About — professional background, education, values and working approach
- https://nazarethgradin.com/contact : Contact — project enquiries, collaborations and consulting

## Selected Projects

- https://nazarethgradin.com/projects/trainfy : Trainfy — redefined a sports marketplace brief to build a community platform. Product design, branding and fullstack development in three weeks.
- https://nazarethgradin.com/projects/las-islas-cies : Las Islas Cíes — transformed a ferry ticketing site into a full destination guide. Product design system scaled to 6 islands. UX, content strategy and SEO.
- https://nazarethgradin.com/projects/silvia-fernandez-de-luna : Silvia Fernández De Luna — built a digital brand from scratch. Strategy, branding, web, marketing and AI-driven automation. Top 10 Google without paid ads.
- https://nazarethgradin.com/projects/ibiza-observatorio : Ibiza Observatorio de Edificación — reference platform for the construction sector in Ibiza. Information architecture, WordPress development, CMS automation and SEO.
- https://nazarethgradin.com/projects/viaje-morocco : Viaje Morocco — full branding and web redesign for a travel agency specialised in authentic Morocco experiences. Visual identity, brand system and digital experience.
- https://nazarethgradin.com/projects/raw-yoga-studio : Raw Yoga Studio — web redesign for a yoga studio. From a basic presence site to a booking platform with memberships and mobile-first experience.
- https://nazarethgradin.com/projects/pan-do-porrino : Pan do Porriño — brand identity that helped Pan do Porriño obtain its Denomination of Origin. Branding, communication and packaging for a 400-year-old artisan product.
- https://nazarethgradin.com/projects/tarxeta-cultura-galega : Tarxeta Cultura Galega — creative concept and institutional launch campaign for the Xunta de Galicia. Mobilised €300,000 in its first year.
